datasets.name: kpis
queryLines: SELECT
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.transportadoras) AS transportadoras,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.motoristas) AS motoristas,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.embarcadores) AS embarcadores,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.cargas) AS total_cargas,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.cargas WHERE status = 'realizada') AS cargas_realizadas,
(SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(valor_frete), 0), 2) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.cargas WHERE status = 'realizada') AS valor_total_fretes_R

datasets.name: por_status
queryLines: SELECT status AS status_carga, COUNT(*) AS quantidade
FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.cargas
GROUP BY status ORDER BY quantidade DESC

datasets.name: por_tipo_carga
queryLines: SELECT tipo_carga, COUNT(*) AS quantidade, ROUND(SUM(valor_frete), 2) AS valor_total
FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.cargas
GROUP BY tipo_carga ORDER BY quantidade DESC LIMIT 10

datasets.name: por_composicao
queryLines: SELECT composicao_veiculo, COUNT(*) AS quantidade
FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.cargas
GROUP BY composicao_veiculo ORDER BY quantidade DESC

datasets.name: por_uf_origem
queryLines: SELECT COALESCE(origem_estado, 'N/A') AS estado, COUNT(*) AS quantidade
FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.cargas
GROUP BY origem_estado ORDER BY quantidade DESC LIMIT 10

datasets.name: por_uf_destino
queryLines: SELECT COALESCE(destino_estado, 'N/A') AS estado, COUNT(*) AS quantidade
FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.cargas
GROUP BY destino_estado ORDER BY quantidade DESC LIMIT 10

datasets.name: por_mes
queryLines: SELECT date_format(data_entrega, 'yyyy-MM') AS ano_mes, COUNT(*) AS realizadas, ROUND(SUM(valor_frete), 2) AS valor_total
FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.cargas
WHERE status = 'realizada' AND data_entrega IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY date_format(data_entrega, 'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY ano_mes

datasets.name: ticket_medio
queryLines: SELECT tipo_carga, COUNT(*) AS quantidade, ROUND(AVG(valor_frete), 2) AS ticket_medio_R, ROUND(SUM(valor_frete), 2) AS valor_total_R
FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.cargas
WHERE status = 'realizada' AND data_entrega IS NOT NULL GROUP BY tipo_carga ORDER BY valor_total_R DESC LIMIT 10

datasets.name: data_quality
queryLines: SELECT 'Transportadoras' AS tabela, COUNT(*) AS registros_com_problema FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.transportadoras

WHERE LENGTH(TRIM(cnpj)) != 14 OR TRIM(COALESCE(nome, '')) = '' OR email NOT LIKE '%@%' OR email IS NULL OR estado NOT IN ('AC','AL','AP','AM','BA','CE','DF','ES','GO','MA','MT','MS','MG','PA','PB','PR','PE','PI','RJ','RN','RS','RO','RR','SC','SP','SE','TO') OR data_cadastro > current_date()
UNION ALL SELECT 'Motoristas', COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.motoristas m

WHERE LENGTH(TRIM(m.cpf)) != 11 OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.transportadoras t WHERE t.id = m.transportadora_id) OR m.categoria_cnh NOT IN ('C','D','E') OR m.categoria_cnh IS NULL OR m.email NOT LIKE '%@%' OR m.email IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Embarcadores', COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.embarcadores

WHERE LENGTH(TRIM(cnpj)) != 14 OR TRIM(COALESCE(nome, '')) = '' OR email NOT LIKE '%@%' OR email IS NULL OR estado NOT IN ('AC','AL','AP','AM','BA','CE','DF','ES','GO','MA','MT','MS','MG','PA','PB','PR','PE','PI','RJ','RN','RS','RO','RR','SC','SP','SE','TO')
UNION ALL SELECT 'Cargas', COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.cargas c

WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.embarcadores e WHERE e.id = c.embarcador_id) OR (status = 'realizada' AND data_entrega IS NULL) OR data_prevista_entrega < data_prevista_coleta OR peso_kg IS NULL OR peso_kg <= 0 OR valor_frete IS NULL OR valor_frete < 0 OR (origem_estado = destino_estado AND origem_cidade = destino_cidade)

datasets.name: data_quality_regras
queryLines: SELECT 'Transportadoras' AS tabela, 'CNPJ inválido' AS regra, COUNT(*) AS registros_com_problema FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.transportadoras WHERE LENGTH(TRIM(cnpj)) != 14
UNION ALL SELECT 'Transportadoras', 'Nome vazio', COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.transportadoras WHERE TRIM(COALESCE(nome, '')) = ''
UNION ALL SELECT 'Transportadoras', 'Email inválido', COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.transportadoras WHERE email NOT LIKE '%@%' OR email IS NULL

UNION ALL SELECT 'Transportadoras', 'UF inexistente', COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.transportadoras WHERE estado NOT IN ('AC','AL','AP','AM','BA','CE','DF','ES','GO','MA','MT','MS','MG','PA','PB','PR','PE','PI','RJ','RN','RS','RO','RR','SC','SP','SE','TO')
UNION ALL SELECT 'Transportadoras', 'Data cadastro no futuro', COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.transportadoras WHERE data_cadastro > current_date()
UNION ALL SELECT 'Motoristas', 'CPF inválido', COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.motoristas WHERE LENGTH(TRIM(cpf)) != 11

UNION ALL SELECT 'Motoristas', 'FK transportadora órfã', COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.motoristas m WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.transportadoras t WHERE t.id = m.transportadora_id)
UNION ALL SELECT 'Motoristas', 'Categoria CNH inválida', COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.motoristas WHERE categoria_cnh NOT IN ('C','D','E') OR categoria_cnh IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Motoristas', 'Email inválido', COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.motoristas WHERE email NOT LIKE '%@%' OR email IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Embarcadores', 'CNPJ inválido', COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.embarcadores WHERE LENGTH(TRIM(cnpj)) != 14
UNION ALL SELECT 'Embarcadores', 'Nome vazio', COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.embarcadores WHERE TRIM(COALESCE(nome, '')) = ''

UNION ALL SELECT 'Embarcadores', 'UF inexistente', COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.embarcadores WHERE estado NOT IN ('AC','AL','AP','AM','BA','CE','DF','ES','GO','MA','MT','MS','MG','PA','PB','PR','PE','PI','RJ','RN','RS','RO','RR','SC','SP','SE','TO')
UNION ALL SELECT 'Embarcadores', 'Email inválido', COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.embarcadores WHERE email NOT LIKE '%@%' OR email IS NULL

UNION ALL SELECT 'Cargas', 'FK embarcador órfã', COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.cargas c WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.embarcadores e WHERE e.id = c.embarcador_id)
UNION ALL SELECT 'Cargas', 'Realizada sem data entrega', COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.cargas WHERE status = 'realizada' AND data_entrega IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT 'Cargas', 'Data entrega antes da coleta', COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.cargas WHERE data_prevista_entrega < data_prevista_coleta
UNION ALL SELECT 'Cargas', 'Peso inválido', COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.cargas WHERE peso_kg IS NULL OR peso_kg <= 0
UNION ALL SELECT 'Cargas', 'Valor frete inválido', COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.cargas WHERE valor_frete IS NULL OR valor_frete < 0
UNION ALL SELECT 'Cargas', 'Origem = destino', COUNT(*) FROM leticia_santos_classic_stable_catalog.motz_demo.cargas WHERE origem_estado = destino_estado AND origem_cidade = destino_cidade

lines: KPIs, cargas por status, tipo, UF e tendência mensal
### Cargas por UF origem e destino
